{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/38561120?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/MrCloudSec/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/MrCloudSec/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/MrCloudSec/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/MrCloudSec/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/MrCloudSec", "id": 38561120, "login": "MrCloudSec", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjM4NTYxMTIw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/MrCloudSec/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/MrCloudSec/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/MrCloudSec/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/MrCloudSec/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/MrCloudSec/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/MrCloudSec", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-12530", "cvss": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:A/VC:H/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-88", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Argument Delimiters in a Command ('Argument Injection')"}], "description": "### Summary
The AWS Bedrock AgentCore Python SDK (bedrock-agentcore) is an open-source SDK that enables developers to build, deploy, and manage agents on AWS Bedrock AgentCore. An issue exists in the install_packages() method of the Code Interpreter client where crafted package name arguments can bypass input validation and allow a remote authenticated user to execute arbitrary commands within the Code Interpreter sandbox.


### Impact
The install_packages() method constructs a 'pip install' shell command executed within the Code Interpreter sandbox using package name arguments provided by the caller. The method applied an incomplete blocklist that allowed crafted package name arguments - specifically pip flags such as '--index-url' and '-r' - to pass validation unchecked. A remote authenticated user who can influence the arguments passed to install_packages() could redirect package resolution to a third-party-controlled PyPI server, or expose the contents of arbitrary sandbox files and environment variables.

**Impacted versions:** AWS Bedrock AgentCore Python SDK (bedrock-agentcore) versions >= 1.1.3 and < 1.6.1

### Patches
This issue has been addressed in bedrock-agentcore version 1.6.1. We recommend upgrading to the latest version and ensuring any forked or derivative code is patched to incorporate the new fixes. 

### Workarounds
If you are unable to upgrade immediately, avoid passing any user-supplied or externally-influenced strings directly to install_packages(). Restrict calls to a fixed, hardcoded list of approved package names within your application code.

### References
If you have any questions or comments about this advisory, we ask that you contact AWS Security via our [vulnerability reporting page](https://aws.amazon.com/security/vulnerability-reporting) or directly via email to [aws-security@amazon.com](mailto:aws-security@amazon.com). Please do not create a public GitHub issue.


We would like to thank Sergio Garcia for collaborating on this issue through the coordinated vulnerability disclosure process.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00302, "percentile": 0.21619}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-6rfw-mq36-jm8h", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T14:46:33Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6rfw-mq36-jm8h", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-6rfw-mq36-jm8h"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-12530"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-17T22:16:20Z", "published_at": "2026-06-19T14:46:33Z", "references": ["https://github.com/aws/bedrock-agentcore-sdk-python/security/advisories/GHSA-6rfw-mq36-jm8h", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-12530", "https://aws.amazon.com/security/security-bulletins/2026-044-aws", "https://pypi.org/project/bedrock-agentcore/1.6.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6rfw-mq36-jm8h"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/aws/bedrock-agentcore-sdk-python/security-advisories/GHSA-6rfw-mq36-jm8h", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/aws/bedrock-agentcore-sdk-python", "summary": "Improper neutralization of argument delimiters in AWS Bedrock AgentCore Python SDK install_packages()", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-23T19:20:32Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-6rfw-mq36-jm8h", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.6.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "bedrock-agentcore"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.1.3, < 1.6.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Improper neutralization of argument delimiters in AWS Bedrock AgentCore Python SDK install_packages()
